name: Sunni Islam
description: The largest branch of Islam, comprising roughly 85-90% of all Muslims. Follows the Quran, Hadith, and the Sunnah of the Prophet Muhammad. Encompasses a wide theological spectrum from progressive to ultraconservative Salafi movements. Dominant across the Arab world, Turkey, South/Southeast Asia, and sub-Saharan Africa.

interReligiousTensions.historicalBasis: Succession dispute, sectarian conflicts in Iraq, Syria, Yemen
